title: Selfsame capture record
description: A recorded call to a target, suitable for replay. The argument payload is serialized with the language-native mechanism; this schema fixes the envelope. See SPEC/protocol.md §5.1.

is_method.description: Whether the first captured argument is the receiver (self/this).

args_b64.description: Base64 of the language-native serialized argument tuple.

captured_with.description: Tool name + version that produced this capture.
